blog_title: Why Kerala Is A Must-Visit Destination For Nature Lovers?
seo_title: Why Kerala Is A Must-Visit Destination For Nature Lovers?
description: Discover the ultimate travel packing list for every adventure. Pack smart, light, and stress-free with essential tips .
body_content:
Published by travelxploria on Tue Jun 17 2025

The wildlife sanctuaries and national parks in Kerala are so eye-gripping that not only kids but adults also get attracted to them. Visiting Kerala and not coming here, you would regret missing the opportunity of watching rare species of animals such as the grizzled giant squirrels, Asian elephants, Nilgiri Tahr, Great King Cobra, Bengal tiger, and more. Also, some of the most popular attractions of Kerala for nature lovers are Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary, Silent Valley, Eravikulam National Park, and Chinnar Wildlife Sanctuary.

Have you always been a nature lover? The kind who prefers the peace and tranquility of nature over the hustle and bustle of daily life? If you answered yes, then you must visit Kerala at least once in your life (even if you aren’t really a travel enthusiast)! The lush green environment, phenomenal hill stations, spectacular waterfalls, splendid backwaters, enthralling nature trails, and fascinating Ayurvedic history and culture make Kerala a place worth visiting for every nature lover.

Want to know the reasons in detail why Kerala is a must-visit destination for nature lovers? Keep on reading.

What every nature enthusiast gets by visiting Kerala:

The wildlife sanctuaries and national parks in Kerala are so eye-gripping that not only kids but adults also get attracted to them. Visiting Kerala and not coming here, you would regret missing the opportunity of watching rare species of animals such as the grizzled giant squirrels, Asian elephants, Nilgiri Tahr, Great King Cobra, Bengal tiger, and more. Also, some of the most popular attractions of Kerala for nature lovers are Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary, Silent Valley, Eravikulam National Park, and Chinnar Wildlife Sanctuary.

The beaches in Kerala, naturally decked up with pleasant lagoons, sheltered bays, white and golden sands, and wonderful palm trees, are alluring natural attractions for every nature lover. Imagine taking a stroll on the shore, hand-in-hand with your partner, making a heart on the sand, writing both your names in it, and building sand castles. If you are an adventure-seeker then do plan some fun beach activities like canoeing, kayaking, surfing, swimming, rafting, and of course, parasailing. Fort Kochi, Kannur, Varkala, Bekal, Marari, Alappuzha, and Kovalam are some of the famed beaches here.

Backwaters are one of the most prominent attractions in Kerala that you must experience. That very feeling of floating on the Backwaters in a houseboat can surely enchant any nature enthusiast. As you glide on the backwater, you are bound to get impressed by the beautiful palm trees, jaw-dropping rice fields, and lush green scenery. Some of the most well-known backwater locations of Kerala are Alleppey and Kumarakom.

The scenic hill stations in Kerala are an absolute visual treat for every nature lover. The high ranges that cover spice and tea plantations, fascinating birds, and remarkable floral and fauna offer you a mesmerizing experience. Wayanad hill station, Ponmudi Hill, Wagamon hill station, Idukki hill station, and Munnar hill station are some of the most famed natural attractions over here that are jammed by thousands of nature enthusiasts every year. Apart from the pleasant nature walks, people love to go mountaineering, on wildlife treks, and rock climbing.

Holidaying in Kerala plus being a nature lover and an adventure-seeker, you can’t miss trekking and hiking. Chimmini, Chembra Peak, Pythal Mala, Munnar, and many other such locations give you once-in-a-lifetime opportunities to explore wildlife, birds, nature, etc. Not only the fresh air but the memorable experience that you will have once you start will stay with you forever.

Utilizing the expertise of a travel agency guarantees a hassle-free and personalized journey, allowing you to fully immerse yourself in the enchanting beauty of Kerala. Hiring a travel agency for visiting Kerala offers a lot of advantages. The pros have in-depth knowledge about the culture, attractions, and hidden gems of Kerala, ensuring a well-rounded experience for you when you decide to stay there. From booking flights, organizing itineraries, arranging transfers, and a lot more, let a travel agency ease the tension out of your vacation plans.
